title: "Error-LIFETIME" when using a clocking block inside a submodule

features.name: clocking block output signal in submodule
features.description: Code should include a clocking block with an output signal declared inside a submodule (non-top-level module)

features.name: task driving clocking block output via @(cb)
features.description: Code should include a task that waits on a clocking block using @(cb) and then drives an output signal via cb.y <= x assignment
